message:
fix: remove unused embedded hook templates and dead installHooks wrapper (bd-gp5b)

The embed directive loaded 5 hook template files into the binary, but
installHooksWithOptions() only used map keys for iteration — content was
always generated dynamically by generateHookSection(). Templates also had
a hardcoded v0.56.1 version that drifted from the dynamic Version variable.

- Remove //go:embed directive, hooksFS, and getEmbeddedHooks()
- Replace with static managedHookNames slice
- Change installHooksWithOptions to accept []string instead of map[string]string
- Remove dead installHooks() wrapper (never called)
- Delete cmd/bd/templates/hooks/ directory (5 template files)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/granite
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -1,9 +0,0 @@
-#!/usr/bin/env sh
-# --- BEGIN BEADS INTEGRATION v0.56.1 ---
-# This section is managed by beads. Do not remove these markers.
-if command -v bd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
-  export BD_GIT_HOOK=1
-  bd hooks run post-checkout "$@"
-  _bd_exit=$?; if [ $_bd_exit -ne 0 ]; then exit $_bd_exit; fi
-fi
-# --- END BEADS INTEGRATION ---
